meta.name: Key Switches
meta.description: Key switches for access control systems
meta.heroTitle: Key-Operated Switches for Access Control and Signalling
meta.heroDescription: Low/high-voltage key switches with four switch types and multiple electrical configurations including single-pole changeover, double-pole and 3-position wiring. Optional protective cover and pre-alarm. Dual-mount design for flush or surface installation with 35mm back box included. Available in six colours with function marking or custom labelling. Designed for indoor access control, system reset and safety-critical switching applications. Not suitable for outdoor use. Not compatible with the Enviro Stopper.
